frontmatter.title: Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List
frontmatter.tldr: I was honored as one of the outstanding postgraduate students during SAPPD's 2022 welcome event at ITB's East Hall. The event marked the return to an in-person format and included introductions to academic programs, faculty, and the prestigious SAPPD Dean's List awards ceremony, followed by a group photo session.

mdx.body:
![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-01.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") As part of the ITB 2022 New Student Admission program, SAPPD held a welcome event for new students for the Undergraduate and Postgraduate Programs at the East Hall of ITB on August 16 and August 18, 2022, respectively. This event marked the first time the program returned to an in-person format since 2019 and was attended by all new students, the Dean's Office, Program Study Chairs, Heads of Expertise Groups, and Academic Advisors. In 2022, SAPPD welcomed a total of 252 undergraduate students, including 19 from the International Pathway (Architecture and Regional and City Planning), and 166 postgraduate students. During the event, the SAPPD Dean's Office introduced SAPPK, including its Vision and Mission, academic programs, student-related procedures, and introduced the Program Study Chairs, Heads of Expertise Groups, academic advisors, and coordinators. Additionally, SAPPD took the opportunity to honor outstanding students from both the undergraduate and postgraduate levels with the SAPPD Dean's List 2022 awards. The awardees for Outstanding Undergraduate and TPB Students are: - M. Ibnu Fadlin Syah (15419066) - Sabian Nathanael Adimulia (15219082) - Santika Devi Permata (15219008) - Lintang Ambar Pramesti (15419061) - Marlina Herlambang (15419134) - Erensa Ratu Chelsia (15221018) The awardees for Outstanding Postgraduate Students are: Master's: - Ricky Firmansyah (24021013) - Ardhana Tahriza Syarif (24221008) - Edi Setiawan (25421058) - [Arnott Ferels](/about) (25221029) - Haniek Azizie (25621014) - Rachmadiarazaq (28821010) - Desy Fatmala Makhmud (28921305) Doctorate: - Irma Yusfida (34220002) - Yasei Dahlia Apritasari (35220003) - Muhammad Alkaf (35420001) Following the event at the East Hall, a group photo session took place at the Love Field (East CC Field).
![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-02.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-03.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-04.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-05.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-06.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-07.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-08.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-09.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List") ![Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List](./figures/deans-list-10.jpg "Welcoming SAPPD 2022 Students & Awarding SAPPD ITB Dean's List")
